name: Spoolman
longDescription:
Spoolman is a self-hosted web service to manage your 3D-printer filament spools and monitor their usage. Keep track of your inventory, remaining filament, and spool history.

Integrates with Klipper/Moonraker, OctoPrint, and Home Assistant. Supports adding spools, vendors, materials, and colors, with automatic tracking of filament consumption per print.
description: Track your 3D-printer filament spool inventory and usage.
